description: Programs itself based on your schedule. Average home saves $140/year on heating and cooling.
Uses 75% less energy than incandescent. Lasts 15+ years. One of the highest ROI home upgrades.
If you buy a $5 coffee daily, that's $150/month. Even a $60 coffee maker + beans at home saves $100+/month.
Replaces bottled water habit. $25 pitcher + $6/month filters vs $30-50/month on bottles.
Eating out for lunch averages $15/day ($300/month). Meal prepping cuts this to $5/day ($100/month).
Eliminates phantom power draw from devices on standby. Average home wastes $100/year on vampire energy.
Seals gaps around doors and windows. Prevents 10-15% of heating/cooling loss.
Reduces toilet paper usage by 75-80%. Average American spends $100+/year on toilet paper.
Replacement blades cost $0.10-0.25 vs $3-5 for cartridges. Same shave quality, fraction of the cost.
Free. Replaces Kindle Unlimited, Audible, and some streaming. Most libraries now have digital apps (Libby).
